failure_reasons: fewer than eight independent proposed groups

cases.rationale: Before the patch the map requests enemy category he_warden; the corrected category is the_warden. The typo leaves the map's enemy-category reference unresolved.
The unresolved category prevents the Warden from appearing. The Warden is the sole producer of quest item 9001, and the commit message confirms the key could not be found.

diff_evidence.commit_message:
Fix typo in quest enemy name

The warden doesn't appear on the location, and in this way Avengard's key couldn't be found. As I see the reason is this typo in name.

groups.rationale: One config-only typo fix restores the Warden spawn and the Warden's key drop. The two labels describe distinct deterministic effects of the same root cause and therefore remain one independent fix group.

cases.rationale: In the Halls of Infinity context Abasi was talker=false and had no reachable dialogue producer for emp_journal_init. The patch makes him a talker and adds the missing activation.
The same Halls of Infinity variant had no reachable journal turn-in producer. The patch adds the item handoff, reward, and emp_journal_finish transition required for completion.

diff_evidence.commit_message: Fix not being able to do Abasi's quest when he's in HOI

groups.rationale: One config-only fix restores both activation and completion of Abasi's journal quest in the Halls of Infinity variant. The two labels share one root cause and remain one independent fix group.

cases.rationale: In the selected parent, Empyrean Bear Trap uses post_effect=immobilize,0,3s, but the Empyrean effect registry defines slow and has no effect with id=immobilize; its required fantasycore dependency supplies no such effect either, while alpha_demo's separate definition is outside this mod's loaded dependency context. The patch changes the reference to slow,0,3s, restoring a resolvable status-effect target.

diff_evidence.commit_message:
Fix Bear Trap "immobilize" effect

"immobilize" is just "slow" with a speed of 0.

groups.rationale: One config-only correction replaces the Bear Trap's unresolved Empyrean effect id with the registered speed effect that implements immobilization at magnitude zero. This is one independent reference-integrity fix.

cases.rationale: In the parent snapshot both the ranger arrow base and enemy shoot-arrow power set wall_power=200, but no Empyrean power definition has id=200. Power id 157 exists and is explicitly named Arrow Wall Strike; the patch changes both unresolved references to 157.

diff_evidence.commit_message: Fix invalid id for arrow wall power

groups.rationale: One config-only commit repairs the same absent Arrow Wall Strike power target at its shared ranger base and enemy-power use sites. The two changed references have one root cause and form one independent dangling-reference fix group.

cases.rationale: The parent alpha_demo element registry defines only fire and ice, while its powers reference air, earth, light, shadow, and wind. The patch adds definitions for air, earth, light, and shadow and replaces both wind references with the now-defined air identifier, eliminating those absent element targets.

diff_evidence.commit_message: Add missing elements to alpha_demo; remove "Resistance" from strings

groups.rationale: One config-only commit completes the alpha_demo element registry and normalizes its obsolete wind uses to air. The missing definitions and mismatched identifier are one registry-completeness root cause and form one independent dangling-reference fix group.

cases.rationale: In the reachable post-move Nazia Highlands context, emp_abasi_2 removes the original Goblin Camp Abasi and leaves abasi_2 with talker disabled and no dialogue. The parent therefore has no reachable producer for emp_journal_init in that context; the patch enables talking and adds the missing activation transition.

After Abasi has moved, an already active journal quest can still produce item 1002 through the Goblin Chief, but the parent has no reachable dialogue that removes the journal and sets emp_journal_finish. The patch adds that turn-in, reward, and completion transition to abasi_2.

diff_evidence.commit_message:
Add "Merchant's Journal" dialog tree to post-move Abasi

Fixes #509

groups.rationale: One config-only fix restores both activation and completion of the Merchant's Journal quest after Abasi moves from Goblin Camp to Nazia Highlands. Both labels arise from the same missing dialogue tree and remain one independent fix group. This is distinct from the later initial-locked Halls of Infinity abasi_3 regression, which was introduced by a separate 2018 relocation stage.

cases.rationale: The parent Frostbite Antlion configuration includes enemies/presets/ranged_antlion.txt, but that target is absent from the complete parent repository tree. The commit explicitly identifies the include as wrong and removes the unresolved reference; this is an absent target rather than a valid-but-wrong choice.
